description: Create a structural steel gusset plate in LibreCAD using millimeters. Draw a 300mm wide by 200mm high rectangular plate with its bottom-left corner at (0,0) and 40mm chamfers on all four corners on a layer named 'STEEL' (Color: Cyan, Index 4). On a layer named 'HOLES' (Color: Yellow, Index 2), place six 22mm diameter bolt holes in a grid with rows at Y=50 and 150, and columns at X=50, 150, and 250. Add the text 'GP-1' with a height of 25mm centered at (150, 100) on a layer named 'MARK' (Color: Red, Index 1). Save the completed drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gusset_plate_gp1.dxf.
